title: Boston Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is hitting Boston with a Z-Score of -3.09. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Boston are extremely cold, with a significant impact on the city's infrastructure. 
 The temperature is expected to remain low, with a Heating Degree Day (HDD) value of 11.8 GG, indicating a high energy demand for heating. 
 The relative humidity is at 61% and the wind speed is 10.0 km/h, which may exacerbate the cold conditions.
conclusion: Activate emergency protocols to mitigate the effects of the cold snap.
